title: three scattered edits in one file
instruction: Make these three changes to handler.ts: (1) change the first line from `import { readFile } from "fs";` to `import { readFile, writeFile } from "fs";`; (2) change `const MAX_RETRIES = 3;` to `const MAX_RETRIES = 5;`; (3) change `return error(400);` to `return error(422);`. Make no other changes.
